title: Persistent Context with Mem0
tagline: Let your agent remember users across sessions: durable, per-user memory with Mem0.

story.problem: Every previous cookbook's agent is amnesiac — it forgets the user the moment the request ends, so it can never personalize or build on past conversations.
story.solution: Wire Mem0 into the agent loop: extract durable facts from each turn, store them per user, and recall the relevant ones to condition future responses.
story.outcome: An agent that remembers a user's preferences, history, and context across sessions — without resending the entire transcript on every call.

prerequisites: A Mem0 API key (https://mem0.ai) — or a self-hosted Mem0 store

quickstart.configure: cp .env.example .env  # then fill NEBIUS_API_KEY and MEM0_API_KEY

endpoints.description: Run the agent with per-user memory recall and stream SSE events back.
List the durable memories stored for a user.
Forget everything stored for a user.
